title: thumbnails Convention
description: Schema for thumbnails Zarr convention, supporting both key-prefixed and nested namespace patterns

attributes.description: Zarr attributes containing convention metadata and properties

conventionMetadata.description: thumbnails convention metadata object for use in zarr_conventions array

schema_url.description: URL to the JSON Schema definition for this convention

spec_url.description: URL to the full specification document

uuid.description: UUID that permanently identifies this convention

name.description: Human-readable name of the convention. Should be 'thumbnails:' for key-prefixed pattern or 'thumbnails' for nested pattern

description.const: thumbnails convention for demonstrating Zarr convention metadata structure
description.description: Brief description of the convention's purpose and usage

width.description: Width of the thumbnail in pixels.

height.description: Height of the thumbnail in pixels.

media_type.description: Media type (formerly MIME type) of the thumbnail, e.g., 'image/jpeg'.

description.description: Free-text description of this thumbnail's context; could be used as alt text.

attributes.description: Unstructured arbitrary metadata about the thumbnail; could store information about how it was generated or how it represents the zarr node.

uri.description: URI reference to the thumbnail image data; should be a relative path to a stored object from prefix of this Zarr node, or an absolute URL with the HTTPS scheme, or a data URI.
